Package com.marswars.swerve_lib.module

Class Module

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
com.marswars.swerve_lib.module.Module
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
ModuleTalonFX
public abstract class Module extends MechBase
Base class for swerve modules with drive and steer control.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Rotation2d
    getAngle()
    Returns the current turn angle of the module.
    SwerveModuleState
    getCurrentState()
    Returns the module state (turn angle and drive velocity).
    double
    getFFCharacterizationVelocity()
    Returns the module velocity in rotations/sec (Phoenix native units).
    SwerveModulePosition
    getPosition()
    Returns the module position (turn angle and drive position).
    double
    getPositionMeters()
    Returns the current drive position of the module in meters.
    SwerveModuleState
    getSetpointState()
    Returns the module setpoint state (turn angle and drive velocity).
    Translation2d
    getTranslation()
    Returns the translation of the module in the robot's coordinate system.
    double
    getVelocityMetersPerSec()
    Returns the current drive velocity of the module in meters per second.
    double
    getWheelRadiusCharacterizationPosition()
    Returns the module position in radians.
    void
    runCharacterization(double output)
    Runs the module with the specified output while controlling to zero degrees.
    void
    runSetpoint(SwerveModuleState state, Module.DriveControlMode DriveMode, Module.SteerControlMode SteerMode)
    Runs the module with the specified setpoint state.
    abstract void
    setDriveGains(int slot, com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs gains)
    Set the gains for the module drive motors to the given slot
    abstract void
    setDriveOpenLoop(double output)
    Run the drive motor at the specified open loop value.
    abstract void
    setDriveVelocity(double velocityRadPerSec)
    Run the drive motor at the specified velocity.
    void
    setModuleOffset()
    Stores the current encoder reading as an offset
    void
    setNeutralMode(com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue mode)
    Sets the neutral mode for both motors
    abstract void
    setSteerGains(com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs gains)
    Set the gains for the module steer motors to the given slot
    abstract void
    setSteerOpenLoop(double output)
    Run the turn motor at the specified open loop value.
    abstract void
    setSteerPosition(Rotation2d rotation)
    Run the turn motor to the specified rotation.
    void
    stop()
    Disables all outputs to motors.

      public Module(String logging_prefix, int index, SwerveModuleConfig config)

  • Method Details

    • runSetpoint

      public void runSetpoint(SwerveModuleState state, Module.DriveControlMode DriveMode, Module.SteerControlMode SteerMode)
      Runs the module with the specified setpoint state. Mutates the state to optimize it.

    • runCharacterization

      public void runCharacterization(double output)
      Runs the module with the specified output while controlling to zero degrees.

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Disables all outputs to motors.

    • getAngle

      public Rotation2d getAngle()
      Returns the current turn angle of the module.

    • getPositionMeters

      public double getPositionMeters()
      Returns the current drive position of the module in meters.

    • getVelocityMetersPerSec

      public double getVelocityMetersPerSec()
      Returns the current drive velocity of the module in meters per second.

    • getPosition

      public SwerveModulePosition getPosition()
      Returns the module position (turn angle and drive position).

    • getCurrentState

      public SwerveModuleState getCurrentState()
      Returns the module state (turn angle and drive velocity).

    • getSetpointState

      public SwerveModuleState getSetpointState()
      Returns the module setpoint state (turn angle and drive velocity).

    • getWheelRadiusCharacterizationPosition

      public double getWheelRadiusCharacterizationPosition()
      Returns the module position in radians.

    • getFFCharacterizationVelocity

      public double getFFCharacterizationVelocity()
      Returns the module velocity in rotations/sec (Phoenix native units).

    • getTranslation

      public Translation2d getTranslation()
      Returns the translation of the module in the robot's coordinate system.
      Returns:
      Translation2d representing the module's position in meters

    • setDriveOpenLoop

      public abstract void setDriveOpenLoop(double output)
      Run the drive motor at the specified open loop value.

    • setSteerOpenLoop

      public abstract void setSteerOpenLoop(double output)
      Run the turn motor at the specified open loop value.

    • setDriveVelocity

      public abstract void setDriveVelocity(double velocityRadPerSec)
      Run the drive motor at the specified velocity.

    • setSteerPosition

      public abstract void setSteerPosition(Rotation2d rotation)
      Run the turn motor to the specified rotation.

    • setDriveGains

      public abstract void setDriveGains(int slot, com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs gains)
      Set the gains for the module drive motors to the given slot

    • setSteerGains

      public abstract void setSteerGains(com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs gains)
      Set the gains for the module steer motors to the given slot

    • setModuleOffset

      public void setModuleOffset()
      Stores the current encoder reading as an offset

    • setNeutralMode

      public void setNeutralMode(com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue mode)
      Sets the neutral mode for both motors
